# Common Blog Post Categories

This file lists the most frequently used categories across HatFullOfData blog posts.
Update this list as new categories emerge or become common.

## Primary Categories (Most Frequent)

- Power BI
- Microsoft Fabric
- Power Automate
- Dataverse
- Power Apps

## Technical Areas

- Power Query
- DAX
- M (Power Query language)
- Dataflow
- Notebooks
- Data Pipeline

## Tools & Platforms

- Azure
- Microsoft Graph
- DevOps
- Excel
- Charticulator

## Special Categories

- Community (announcements, reviews, personal updates)
- Paginated Reports
- Variable Libraries
- VBA
- SVG
- Google Analytics
- Project

## Usage Notes

- Categories can be combined (e.g., "Power BI" + "Dataverse")
- Custom categories are allowed if none of these fit
- Categories are case-sensitive in frontmatter
- Some posts use year ranges like "2025-2026" for series tracking
